[2019-01-20 23:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): make a post about it on the subreddit :EGGERS:
[2019-01-20 23:28] sano712 (sano): The toxicity in this game is absurd. I'm literally shaking right now.
[2019-01-20 23:28] sano712 (sano): seriously tho, it's pretty amusing that it's incredibly rare to find people like this
[2019-01-20 23:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): its the one way to guarantee a dev response
[2019-01-20 23:28] sano712 (sano): especially coming from a dota background where people legit intentionally ruin games 50% of the time
[2019-01-20 23:29] namington: to guarantee a dev response, just hit prismata with 100k trading card afkbots
[2019-01-20 23:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): its the casuals that tilt im guessing, and prismata doesn't really appeal to that demographic
[2019-01-20 23:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): like the learning curve is kinda steep so anyone who wants to make it into master has to put time into improving
[2019-01-20 23:30] sano712 (sano): masn, the higher mmr you go in dota the most toxic it is
[2019-01-20 23:30] sano712 (sano): i'm talking about top 0.5% players
[2019-01-20 23:30] sano712 (sano): and it's game ruiners and ragers every game
[2019-01-20 23:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): and also the matchmaking gets it so that new players tend to be matched up (and due to the way mata works, that means almost a guarenteed lost) so people who tilt likely quit the game?
[2019-01-20 23:30] sano712 (sano): i think it's more related to being e team game vs solo game
[2019-01-20 23:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): but if people ruin games, how do they make top 0.5%? 🤔
[2019-01-20 23:31] sano712 (sano): it's a lot easier to blame others for your loss
[2019-01-20 23:31] sano712 (sano): obviously they dont ruin EVERY game
[2019-01-20 23:31] sano712 (sano): usually they just flame
[2019-01-20 23:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): but even 10%, your winrate has to be a lot higher on the other 90% to make up
[2019-01-20 23:31] sano712 (sano): but it's not rare for people to intentionally feed, break their items etc
[2019-01-20 23:32] sano712 (sano): you can be a top 0.1% player with roughly 50% winrate
[2019-01-20 23:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): and its human nature to blame others, so checks out
[2019-01-20 23:32] sano712 (sano): if you're a good player you already calibrate very high
[2019-01-20 23:32] sano712 (sano): then you quickly reach your true mmr and then you can fluctuate with around 50% winrate and still be in the top 100 of your region
[2019-01-20 23:32] sano712 (sano): because you get matched with people of similar skill
[2019-01-20 23:33] sano712 (sano): it's different than prismata where the low player pool means top players need to smash 1900 players most of the time to maintain their rating
[2019-01-20 23:33] sano712 (sano): anyways, I was just wondering if there was a way to report someone
[2019-01-20 23:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): but if you get matched with people of similar skill and throw 10% games, don't you end up at 45% wr?
[2019-01-20 23:34] sano712 (sano): but this dude probably won't be around much with that attitude
[2019-01-20 23:34] sano712 (sano): well yeah if you throw 10% of your game, your MMR will be slightly lower than what it should be
[2019-01-20 23:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): there's a few "formal" channels to do it, the reddit most method is the most consistent channel (though its considered bad form), otherwise you can just ignore it and the person will likely go away
[2019-01-20 23:34] sano712 (sano): it doesn't necessarily affect your winrate, but your MMR
[2019-01-20 23:36] wilson0862 (Wilson): If you have evidence, PM it to a mod.
[2019-01-20 23:36] wilson0862 (Wilson): If there was a mod in game at the time that would probably be your best avenue. @sano
[2019-01-20 23:37] wilson0862 (Wilson): Sorry this happened to you. :(
[2019-01-20 23:37] masn6811 (Masne98888): if you need a mod, pinging the whole mod team on discord is likely to get one (its a pingable role)
[2019-01-20 23:37] masn6811 (Masne98888): it might ping too many people, but that's what they signed up for, right? :LongNoseLiar:
